message:
feat(connectors): migrate all connector operations from ad-hoc JSON to typed OperationInfo

Replace hand-crafted serde_json::json! operation arrays with typed
OperationInfo structs across all 10 connectors (algolia, amplitude,
arxiv, bigquery, elasticsearch, hubspot, metabase, retool, salesforce,
snowflake).

Each connector's operations_info() now returns Vec<OperationInfo> with
properly typed fields:
- OperationId, CapabilityId (typed string wrappers)
- RiskLevel, SafetyTier, IdempotencyClass (enums)
- AgentHint (structured AI guidance)
- Optional description, rate_limit, requires_approval

Benefits:
- Compile-time field validation (no more missing/misspelled JSON keys)
- Consistent introspection response structure across all connectors
- Type-safe operation lookup in authorize_action (o.id.as_ref() vs
  JSON .get("id").and_then(as_str))
- Serde serialization into JSON for backward-compatible introspection
  responses via serde_json::to_value()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
